nf/quick-369-implement-project-level-for.task_description: Add provider-level concurrency control to quorum dispatch — group slots by provider, limit concurrent HTTP requests per provider (e.g., max 2-3 to Together.xyz), stagger remaining slots with backoff.
nf/quick-369-implement-project-level-for.approach: Implement provider-level concurrency control in quorum dispatch by grouping HTTP requests by baseUrl, limiting concurrent requests per provider, and staggering remaining slots with exponential backoff to prevent rate-limit cascades.
out_of_scope: Modifying providers.json configuration structure — provider grouping derived from existing baseUrl fields
Changes to individual slot timeout values — concurrency control operates at dispatch layer
Retrofitting CLI-backed subprocess slots with HTTP-style queueing
Adaptive rate-limit detection and dynamic limits — initial implementation uses fixed caps
Cross-provider load balancing or request prioritization
nf/quick-369-implement-project-level-for.risk_reason: Feature task touching 2 core dispatch files with new concurrency logic, but no formal model or requirement changes.
